name: Ivory Nightdress Flash POV
description: Blonde woman in ivory cotton nightdress on patterned bedsheets, high-angle POV with direct flash, late 2000s digital compact camera aesthetic with CCD grain and date stamp
input_prompt: blonde woman ivory nightdress bed flash high angle pov 2000s digital camera grain date stamp

subject.description: young blonde woman in ivory cotton nightdress lying diagonally across patterned bedsheets, soft unfocused gaze at lens, captured in intimate high-angle POV with direct flash

face.details: eye_contact: direct to lens but soft; lips: subtle glossy
face.makeup: minimalist makeup with subtle glossy lips and natural skin glow

clothing.details: delicate lace trim, ultra-thin straps; neckline: deep V-neck

pose_action.camera_relation: lying down, camera above looking down
pose_action.dynamic_elements: angle: high-angle POV (point of view); framing: close-up candid snapshot

background: underexposed room, darkened edges from vignetting

lighting.quality: harsh direct flash typical of compact cameras

post_processing.overlay: amber digital date stamp in corner

the_vibe.story: private moment captured on old digital camera

flattened_prompt: late 2000s digital compact camera snapshot 9:16, young blonde woman 23 American Caucasian lying on patterned cotton bedsheets, natural visible skin texture warm blush undertones, blonde natural texture hair, soft unfocused gaze direct at lens, subtle glossy lips minimalist makeup natural glow, enhanced feminine curvaceous silhouette, ivory cotton nightdress deep V-neck delicate lace trim ultra-thin straps relaxed draped, high-angle POV looking down diagonal body alignment close-up candid, underexposed room darkened edges, DIRECT ON-CAMERA FLASH hard shadows slight highlight blowout vignetting, CCD grain luminance noise slight motion blur fixed-lens distortion, AMBER DIGITAL DATE STAMP in corner, intimate raw imperfect snapshot aesthetic
negative_prompt_flat: professional lighting, studio setup, modern smartphone, sharp high resolution, skin smoothing, beauty filter, anime, illustration

flux.prompt: late 2000s digital camera snapshot, blonde woman 23 lying on patterned bedsheets, natural skin texture warm undertones, soft unfocused gaze at lens glossy lips, curvaceous feminine figure, ivory cotton nightdress deep V-neck lace trim thin straps draped, high-angle POV diagonal body alignment close-up, DIRECT ON-CAMERA FLASH hard shadows highlight blowout vignetting, CCD GRAIN luminance noise motion blur fixed-lens distortion, AMBER DATE STAMP corner, intimate raw imperfect snapshot, 9:16
flux.negative_prompt: professional lighting, studio, modern smartphone, skin smoothing, beauty filter, anime

camera.overlay: Amber digital date stamp in corner
camera.negative_constraints: no professional lighting, no modern quality, no skin smoothing

midjourney.prompt: late 2000s digital camera snapshot, blonde woman ivory nightdress on bed, high angle POV, direct flash hard shadows vignetting, CCD grain noise motion blur, amber date stamp overlay, intimate raw imperfect --ar 9:16 --style raw --v 6
midjourney.notes: Use --style raw for authentic compact camera feel

ideogram.prompt: Young blonde woman in ivory cotton nightdress lying on patterned bedsheets, high-angle point of view looking down, direct on-camera flash creating hard shadows and highlight blowout, late 2000s digital compact camera aesthetic with visible CCD grain and noise, amber date stamp in corner

recraft.prompt: 2000s digital camera snapshot, woman ivory nightdress on bed, high angle flash POV, hard shadows grain noise, date stamp overlay

luma.prompt: Late night bedroom, flash fires as camera captures intimate moment from above, woman in nightdress on bed, old digital camera quality, grainy nostalgic snapshot
luma.motion_notes: Flash burst effect, subtle movement, intimate frozen moment

reve.prompt: Nostalgic photography in the style of late 2000s digital compact cameras, intimate flash snapshot, blonde woman ivory nightdress, high-angle POV, CCD grain and date stamp aesthetic, raw imperfect quality

grok-imagine.prompt: Young blonde woman in ivory cotton nightdress lying on patterned bedsheets, high-angle POV looking down, direct on-camera flash with hard shadows and vignetting, late 2000s digital compact camera quality with CCD grain and noise, amber date stamp in corner

gpt-image-1.5.prompt: A 23-year-old blonde American woman lies diagonally across patterned cotton bedsheets, photographed from a high-angle point of view looking down. She has natural texture blonde hair, natural skin with warm blush undertones and visible texture, and a soft unfocused gaze directed at the lens with subtle glossy lips. Her curvaceous enhanced feminine silhouette is visible as she wears an ivory cotton nightdress with a deep V-neck, delicate lace trim, and ultra-thin straps, draped naturally and relaxed. The image is lit by direct on-camera flash creating hard shadows, slight highlight blowout, and vignetting at the edges. The aesthetic captures late 2000s digital compact camera quality with noticeable CCD grain, luminance noise, slight motion blur, and fixed-lens distortion. An amber digital date stamp appears in the corner of the frame. The bedroom background is underexposed with darkened edges. No professional lighting. No modern smartphone quality. Authentic imperfect snapshot aesthetic.
gpt-image-1.5.notes: Natural language paragraphs, explicit preservation constraints, no quality tags

seedream-4.5.prompt: Young blonde woman 23 lying on patterned bedsheets, ivory cotton nightdress with deep V-neck lace trim and thin straps, soft unfocused gaze at camera glossy lips, high-angle POV looking down diagonal body alignment, direct on-camera flash with hard shadows and highlight blowout, late 2000s digital compact camera aesthetic with CCD grain luminance noise motion blur, amber date stamp in corner, intimate raw imperfect snapshot, not professionally lit or modern quality
seedream-4.5.notes: Coherent natural language, subject first, concise photography terms, inline style negation

flux-kontext-max.prompt: A 23-year-old blonde woman lies diagonally on patterned cotton bedsheets, photographed from a high-angle POV looking down. She wears an ivory cotton nightdress with deep V-neck, delicate lace trim, and ultra-thin straps. Her expression is soft with an unfocused gaze at the lens and subtle glossy lips. Direct on-camera flash creates hard shadows, slight highlight blowout, and vignetting. Late 2000s digital compact camera quality with visible CCD grain, luminance noise, and motion blur. Amber digital date stamp in corner. Intimate raw imperfect snapshot aesthetic.
flux-kontext-max.editing_prompt: Change the nightdress color from ivory to pale pink while keeping the same lace trim and V-neck design. Preserve the flash lighting, CCD grain, date stamp, and her soft unfocused expression exactly as they appear.
flux-kontext-max.notes: Natural language with preservation clauses for editing mode, 512 token limit

playbook_principles_applied: 1_hierarchical_specificity: Detailed nightdress (deep V, lace trim, thin straps), specific camera era artifacts
2_realism_anchors: 'direct flash hard shadows', 'CCD grain', 'amber date stamp', 'fixed-lens distortion'
3_technical_camera: 'late 2000s digital compact', 'CCD sensor artifacts', 'luminance noise', 'motion blur'
4_negative_hygiene: prevents professional lighting, modern quality, skin smoothing
5_spatial_consistency: clear high-angle POV with diagonal body alignment
6_lighting_storytelling: 'direct on-camera flash' = intimate imperfect snapshot mood
7_era_authenticity: specific 2000s camera artifacts (CCD grain, date stamp, vignetting)
